conversation.text: Build a workflow that receives a webhook POST with a JSON body containing 'priority' and 'message'. Route priority 'urgent' items to Slack channel #incidents, priority 'normal' items to Gmail at ops@example.com, and send every unmatched priority to Slack channel #triage as the default fallback branch. Configure all nodes completely and don't ask for credentials.

executionScenarios.name: urgent-routing
executionScenarios.description: Urgent payload routes to the incidents Slack branch
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives {"priority":"urgent","message":"Database latency is high"}. Slack returns success.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The urgent branch sends the message to Slack channel #incidents and does not route it to the normal Gmail branch.

executionScenarios.name: normal-routing
executionScenarios.description: Normal payload routes to the Gmail branch
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives {"priority":"normal","message":"Daily handoff ready"}. Gmail returns success.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The normal branch sends an email to ops@example.com containing the message and does not route it to #incidents.

executionScenarios.name: fallback-routing
executionScenarios.description: Unexpected priority routes to the fallback Slack branch
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives {"priority":"low","message":"FYI only"}. Slack returns success.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The unmatched priority uses the default fallback branch and sends the message to Slack channel #triage.
